pages.text: $(rev)Corpus entry:$(warn) fragments torn from Rabbit donors keep their cultural locomotion hints even when stitched elsewhere.

pages.title: Recorded anatomy
pages.text: Head, Torso, Legs — twitchy hop donor.

pages.title: Stitcher's marginalia
pages.text: Mix with skeleton arms for cartoonish bolt-throwers.
